collected_evidence_summary: Manual stronger-source collection row from the reviewed metadata-only UniProtKB TrEMBL record for G3SX30/G3SX30_LOXAF. The record reports Loxodonta africana MDM2, taxid 9785, length 492, reviewed status unreviewed, and protein existence inferred from homology. No sequence was fetched or reviewed. This collection row is for later intake/review only and remains blocked.
